prompt: Implement bitfield.c. bitfield_read32 extracts field.width bits at field.index. bitfield_write32 replaces exactly that field. Width may be 0 through 32; width 32 is valid only at index 0. Out-of-range fields leave writes unchanged and reads return 0. Avoid undefined shifts.
